title: User Preferences Data
description: User Preferences data for the In Dire Straits web site

type.description: The type of thingy the data describes, 'user-preferences'.

schemaVersion.description: The version of the schema for the data.

characterSheet.title: Character Sheet Preferences
characterSheet.description: Preferences related to how character sheets are rendered.

traitViewStyle.title: Trait View Style
traitViewStyle.description: How should traits on the character sheet be rendered, by Name, by Rank, or as a Pyramid

lastUpdated.title: Last updated
lastUpdated.description: The epoch timestamp when the preferences were last updated.
